# Rocket League Championship Series Overlay and Game HUD

> Custom dynamic broadcasting overlays and in-game HUDs made for RLCS-competing teams by LNDRLNDRLNDR. Each overlay replaces the default Rocket League HUD with a fully team-branded design, adding real-time boost meters, a minimap during goal replays, and post-game statistics.

## RLCS Team Overlays

- [RLCS Overlay Portfolio](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): Full showcase of RLCS team overlays with screenshots and video demos
- [Gen.G Mobil1 Racing](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): North American team; Formula 1 racing theme with speed meter, animated sponsor box, minimap on replays
- [Oxygen Esports (OXG)](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): American esports organization overlay
- [Team BDS](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): Swiss esports organization overlay
- [PSG Tundra](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): European team; co-branded Paris Saint-Germain and Tundra Esports overlay
- [Team Vitality](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): French organization; two-time RLCS World Champions overlay
- [Quadrant](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): Co-founded by F1 driver Lando Norris and Veloce Esports
- [Akrew](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): American organization based in Arlington, Virginia
- [Resolve](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): English esports organization overlay
- [G1 / Gamers First](https://lndrlndr.github.io/RLCS-Overlay/): NFL-inspired overlay; hosted the G1 Invitational with a $10k prize pool

## Optional

- [Full Overlay Portfolio](https://lndrlndr.github.io/portfolio/): All custom overlay projects including non-RLCS clients
- [Contact](https://lndrlndr.github.io/Contact/): Commission a custom overlay
